box.content: The Future of Full-stack Performance.

list.text: Next.js 15: The Ultimate React Framework.
Fastify: Low Overhead, High Throughput.

box.content: Aravind Govindhasamy

list.text: Elite Technical Architect
Full-stack & Performance Lead

box.content: Rethinking the Web with React Server Components.
A paradigm shift in routing, focusing on modularity and server-centric rendering.

list.text: Directory-based: Routes are defined by folders.
Layout-first: Nested layouts are a first-class citizen.

box.content: Render components on the server to reduce client-side JS and improve performance.

list.text: Zero JS: RSCs don't send JS to the client.
Direct DB Access: Fetch data directly in your components.

box.content: The next-generation bundler, written in Rust, for lightning-fast development builds.

list.text: Rust-powered: Optimized for speed and concurrency.
Fast Refresh: Instant updates during development.

box.content: Declarative data fetching in the component body.
Next.js 15 optimizes your app by caching data and rendered results automatically.

list.text: Request Memoization: Fetch the same data multiple times in one request without extra calls.
Data Cache: Persistence across multiple requests.

box.content: Improve perceived performance by streaming parts of the page as they become ready.
The high-performance custom server for Next.js.
Fastify is significantly faster than Express and has a modern, plugin-based architecture.

list.text: Speed: One of the fastest web frameworks in the Node.js ecosystem.
Encapsulation: Plugins make it easy to organize code.

box.content: Integrating Next.js into the Fastify request lifecycle.
Leveraging the Fastify ecosystem for everything from DB connections to validation.

list.text: fastify-cors: Standard CORS support.
fastify-helmet: Security headers made easy.

box.content: Built-in JSON Schema validation for high throughput and security.
Fastify comes with Pino, the fastest Node.js logger, built-in.

list.text: Low Overhead: Log without blocking the event loop.
Structured: Easy to parse and analyze in production.

box.content: Mastering mutations and caching in Next.js 15.
Define server-side logic that can be called directly from client components.
Leveraging TypeScript to ensure that the data you send to the server is always valid.

list.text: Zod Validation: Validate formData on the server.
Shared Types: Reuse types between client and server.

box.content: Fine-grained control over when your data should be updated.
A new optimization that combines static shell with dynamic islands of content.

list.text: Instant Shell: The static part of your page loads immediately.
Streaming Dynamic: Dynamic parts are streamed in as they're ready.

box.content: A React hook that allows you to update the UI immediately during a server action.
Mastering Parallel and Intercepting Routes.
Render multiple pages in the same layout simultaneously.

list.text: Dashboards: Complex UIs with independent sections.
Slots: Use @folder naming convention to define slots in layouts.

box.content: Load a route from another part of your application within the current context (e.g., photo modals).

list.text: Modal Pattern: Open a modal with a URL that can be shared.
Soft/Hard Navigation: Seamlessly handle back button and direct refresh.

box.content: Dynamic and static metadata for SEO and social sharing.
Combining Parallel Routes with Suspense for an optimized user experience.

list.text: Independent Loading: Each slot can have its own loading state.
Polished UI: No more blank screens while waiting for data.

box.content: Professional management of environment variables in Next.js 15.

list.text: .env.local: Secure local development.
Build-time vs Runtime: Understanding when variables are injected.

box.content: Why Fastify is so fast: it uses pre-compiled schemas for serialization.

list.text: 2x-5x Faster: Significantly faster than standard JSON.stringify.
Validation: Ensures your outgoing data matches your API contract.

box.content: Reusing schemas for both validation and serialization to minimize boilerplate.
box.code:
const mySchema = { type: 'object', properties: { id: { type: 'string' } } };
fastify.get('/item', { schema: { response: { 200: mySchema } } }, handler);

box.content: Gaining visibility into your production environment.

list.text: Tracing: Track requests across Next.js and Fastify boundaries.
Structured Logs: Centralize your Pino logs for analysis.

box.content: Ensuring your application is ready to receive traffic.
Protecting your Next.js and Fastify applications.
Run code before a request is completed, perfect for auth and redirect logic.
Fastify's version of middleware, allowing you to intercept requests at various stages of their lifecycle.

list.text: onRequest: Very early in the request lifecycle.
preValidation: Ideal for security checks.

box.content: Protecting your app from XSS and other injection attacks by defining which resources are allowed to load.

list.text: Strict: Only allow known sources.
Nonces: Using nonces to allow specific scripts.

box.content: Modern patterns for managing user identity using NextAuth.js or custom session logic.

list.text: Social Login: Easy integration with Google, GitHub, etc.
Stateless: Leveraging JWTs for scalable authentication.

box.content: Modern deployment strategies for Next.js 15.
Next.js can automatically create a minimal standalone build directory that includes only the necessary files for production.
Building small, secure, and fast Docker images for your Next.js and Fastify app.

list.text: Multi-stage Builds: Keep your final image lean.
Non-root User: Better security in production.

box.content: Deploying parts of your application to the edge for the lowest possible latency.

list.text: Global: Your code runs in regions close to your users.
Fast: Minimal startup time and high performance.

box.content: Leveraging Fastify's high performance to handle massive traffic with minimal resources.

list.text: Horizontal Scaling: Run multiple instances behind a load balancer.
Cluster Mode: Utilize all CPU cores on a single machine.

box.content: Testing strategies for modern Next.js 15 applications.
Testing your Server Actions and utilities with Vite's high-performance test runner.
The gold standard for end-to-end testing, ensuring your App Router pages and Server Actions work in real browsers.

list.text: Realistic: Test across Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit.
Parallel: Run hundreds of tests in minutes.

box.content: Strategies for isolating your tests by mocking database calls and downstream services.

list.text: Service Mocking: Use MSW or custom mocks.
Predictable: Ensure your tests are not flaky due to external dependencies.

box.content: Verifying the interaction between Next.js frontend and Fastify backend components.

list.text: End-to-End: Validate the entire request-response flow.
Contract Testing: Ensure API boundaries remain stable.

box.content: The Future of Full-stack with Next.js 15.
A perfect synergy of modern developer experience and industrial-grade backend performance.

list.text: Elite Architecture: Built on React Server Components.
Throughput: Fastify handles the heaviest loads with ease.
Ready for the Edge: Global delivery baked-in.

box.content: Stay updated with the latest in the Next.js and Fastify ecosystems.

list.text: Evolution: Expect even deeper React integration and performance gains.
Tooling: Turbopack and other Rust-based tools will continue to mature.

box.content: Build your first elite app with this stack today.

list.text: Practice: Migrate an existing app or start a new project.
Learn: Explore the official documentation and community resources.

box.content: Thank you for joining! Any questions?
